# Scoring — investment-memo.5

| # | Dimension | Weight | Score | Justification |
|---|---------------------------|--------|-------|---------------|
| 1 | Recommendation clarity    | 5      | 5     | Single unambiguous invest recommendation with check size. |
| 2 | Thesis coherence          | 6      | 6     | Falsifiable thesis, logically chained claims. |
| 3 | Evidence quality          | 8      | 8     | Every load-bearing claim is sourced. |
| 4 | Risk honesty              | 6      | 6     | Top risks named with mitigations. |
| 5 | Market & competitive framing | 4   | 4     | TAM/SAM/SOM sized to the artifact. |
| 6 | Financial reasoning       | 5      | 5     | Unit economics with sensitivity analysis. |
| 7 | Scope discipline          | 4      | 4     | Target 1800-2400 words; actual 2100 — in range. |
| 8 | Prose & structure         | 4      | 4     | Navigable headings, tight prose. |
| 9 | Rhetorical economy        | 6      | 6     | Every paragraph load-bearing. |
